characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Ambiguously Human: Never confirmed if she's theToken Humanor aliving doll. Catchphrase: "Look on the bright side." Cheerful Child: She's insatiably chipper and optimistic. Creepy Child: In a sense, she's a 10 year old girl who has Gothic and creepy tastes and interests. Every Proper Lady Should Curtsey: Does this when complimented.

characters.name: Ruby Gloom
characters.description: Ambiguously Human: Never confirmed if she's theToken Humanor aliving doll. Catchphrase: "Look on the bright side." Cheerful Child: She's insatiably chipper and optimistic. Creepy Child: In a sense, she's a 10 year old girl who has Gothic and creepy tastes and interests. Every Proper Lady Should Curtsey: Does this when complimented.

characters.name: Doom Kitty
characters.description: Ruby's black-furred pet cat who communicates solely through the sounds of violin chords. However, she's actually quite canny and is usually the first to know when something's happening around the mansion. Amplified Animal Aptitude: She's not aTalking Animallike Poe and Scaredy, but she's just as smart (if not more so) than they are. Cute Kitten: A black and absolutely adorable cat. Dark Is Not Evil: Has black fur and is one of the good guys. Deathbringer the Adorable: Despite her malevolent-sounding name, she's actually very harmless and very cute.

characters.name: Iris
characters.description: Catchphrase: "I'm good!" Challenge Seeker: Always performing stunts. Cute Clumsy Girl: Gets injured a lot while adventuring. Cute Monster Girl: A cyclops who is quite adorable. Cyclops: Only drawn with one eye.

characters.name: Misery
characters.description: 13 Is Unlucky: Interestingly inverted, as she becomes aPlague of Good Fortuneon Friday the 13th to the point that lightning avoids her. She's so annoyed by this that, when the day ends, she is relived to get her bad luck again. Adaptational Attractiveness: She was a lot uglier in the original merchandise. Ambiguously Human: What exactly she is is never made clear. She may be a banshee, some form of undead, a personification of misfortune, or simply an incredibly unlucky human. SeeOur Banshees Are Louder. Amusing Injuries: Misery is regularly hit by lightning, only to say "ow" and come back 10 seconds later in perfect shape (although sometimes she ends up badly singed and almost hairless). Beautiful Singing Voice:When she's asleep. When she sleepwalks around the house singing in Unsung Hero, Frank, Len and Ruby all note her sleep-singing as being lovely, and decide she'd be perfect for the upcoming Gloomapalooza performance.

characters.name: Skull Boy
characters.description: Adaptation Species Change: In the books he was a shy human boy who wore a skull to hide his face. Bungling Inventor: He builds a lot of devices for many purposes, although their level of success tends to vary. Child Prodigy: He shows great aptitude for most of the fields he pursues, and often builds complex contraptions. In one episode, he even builds aworkingTime Machine! Dem Bones: A skeleton. Desperately Looking for a Purpose in Life: All he wants is to find what he's important for. A musical episode focused on him leaving Gloomsville to find his origin.

characters.name: Frank & Len
characters.description: Aloof Big Brother: Frankseeshimself as this, at least. Band of Relatives: They perform together in a band called RIP as the only permanent members. One incarnation of the band was a Band of Relativessquared, as it had two of Misery's relatives (Morose as singer and keyboardist and an unnamed maid relative on drums) as members. Big Eater: Their appetites are limitless. Boke and Tsukkomi Routine: Len is the Boke and Frank tends to be the Tsukkomi, although Frank is only smart relative to Len and can sometimes be pretty dim himself, thereby subverting this. Catchphrase: Frank has "You're just not getting it, Len."

characters.name: Mr. Buns
characters.description: A stuffed rabbit Ruby knitted together herself. While he seems to be not much more than a plush toy, most of the other characters treat him as if he were alive, and there are a few hints that they might be right. Ambiguously Sentient Object: Mr. Buns, a rabbit plush created by Ruby out of socks in the second episode, is regularly treated by all the characters (sans Misery in "Missing Buns") as alive. He is never shown moving, eating, or interacting with anything, but the implied aftermath of each thing is shown, such as having a stuffed belly with missing food, a paper airplane being thrown towards Boo Boo when Mr. Buns is the only other one in the class, or appearing in inexplicable areas it wouldn't make sense to move him to (like the top of a tree). Big Eater: He's often seen next to empty trays of food orstuffedto bursting. Bunnies for Cuteness: A rabbit plush toy. Companion Cube: A rabbit toy and friend of the main characters.

characters.name: Poe
characters.description: Clever Crows: He and his brothers are ravens and himself is a wise raven, good guy and a loyal friend, although he is usually somewhat selfish andJerkass(sometimes) due to his big ego. Creepy Crows: He and his brothers fit in with the show's dark setting, but they'renot really all that bad. Half-Dressed Cartoon Animal: He wears only a dark purple cape with a white dickey with a red bow, he wears a top hat with a navy blue ribbon, he also wears white gloves and he wears spats on his bare feet, but he no wears pants. High-Class Glass: He wears a monocle in attempts to seem sophisticated. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: He can be arrogant and pretentious, but he's a good guy and a loyal friend.

characters.name: Scaredy Bat
characters.description: Acrophobic Bird: He's a bat, but he is afraid of flying nonetheless. Big "NO!": He does this every once in a while. Bollywood Nerd: Well, he's certainly got the right accent... Butt-Monkey: Lots of bad things happen to him. Cute Little Fangs: Scaredy has noticeable fangs, but they are small and cute.

characters.name: Boo Boo
characters.description: Berserk Button: He hates being called "cute." Invisible to Normals: At first, only cats, psychics and crazy street preachers could see him. He had to successfully scare someone in order to be visible. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: While he loves to scare people, he's generally a decent guy. Our Ghosts Are Different: He had to earn his intangibility and visibility to living people. The Prankster: He loves pranking everyone. Especially Scaredy.

characters.name: Edgar and Allan
characters.description: The Big Guy: They both share this.Big Guy, Little Guy: Both have this dynamic with Poe. Big Guy, Little Guy: Both have this dynamic with Poe. Dumb Muscle: They both seem to be this since they took Skull Boy seriously when he told them to lock him up. They also didn't slow down when flying towards the glass house. Fat and Skinny: And this dynamic with each other Flat Character: They rarely do anything and mostly just exist to complete the "Edgar Allen Poe" name pun.

characters.name: Mr. White and Mr. White
characters.description: Ambiguously Related: They are apparently a part of Boo Boo’s family, but how specifically is never clarified. Evil Mentors: To Boo Boo in regards to scaring. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: They are gruff and quite menacing ghosts who specialize in scaring others, but they aren't actually intentionally mean at all and can be quite friendly. The Mafia: They act like mafiosos. One-Steve Limit: Averted.

characters.name: Squig
characters.description: Big Creepy-Crawlies: Squig is a gigantic bug. Gentle Giant: A big bug with a big heart. Giant Flyer: Iris uses him as transport.

characters.name: Venus
characters.description: Just a Stupid Accent: She speaks with a French accent due to the record Iris used to teach her to speak was dictated by a French man. Man-Eating Plant: Although she doesn't eat people. Meaningful Name: Partly overlaps withA Dog Named "Dog"given the kind of plant she is, Venus is also the name of the Roman goddess of love, and she's shown to be a hopeless romantic in the episode "Venus de Gloomsville" Pastimes Prove Personality: She's a writer. Took a Level in Kindness: After eating a heart thatSkull Boy made for his robot dad, she went from an amoral eating machine to a sweet and friendly plant.

characters.name: Mr. Mummbles
characters.description: Circus of Fear: He has a G-rated one which he builds and designs rides for which,ofcourse, Ruby and friends love. Cool Old Guy: An eccentric and friendly old man who likes making others happy. Head Pet: His pet frog, Socrates. Mad Scientist: He has the mannerisms of one, but he's a nice guy. Mistaken for Murderer: By Poe in his debut episode.

characters.name: Misery's Family
characters.description: Alliterative Family: All their names start with "M". All Just a Dream: It's speculated thata few of the Misery relatives that appeared in the reunion episode might have been figments of her own imagination. Asian Speekee Engrish: Mildew. Big "WHY?!": Morose is prone to doing this. Catchphrase:Morose has"Why? WHY?!"Migraine has"I'm queen of the world!"Mildew has"Confusion say..."Malady has "It's a scrape. I'll be fine."

characters.name: Skele-T and the Skele-Tunes
characters.description: Dem Bones: All of them are skeletons. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: Skele-T is rather vain and loves to mess with people, yet he is still a jovial and good hearted guy. Jive Turkey: Skele-T, to the point where people don't understand what he's saying. Left the Background Music On: ARunning Gagin "Last Train To Gloomsville" Part 1 and 2 is them being responsible for this, to the annoyance of everyone else.[Ominous Pipe Organplays during a dramatic moment]Ruby:I don't think that's helping.Skele-T:Sorry. Just can't resist. The Pranksters: They prank Skull Boy by hiding when he tries to introduce them to his friends.

characters.name: Bunny
characters.description: Bitch in Sheep's Clothing: He acts sweet and innocent around Ruby and co. but is a thief and is cruel to Doom. Bunnies for Cuteness: Subverted. Bunny is a complete jerk. A Dog Named "Dog": A bunny named "Bunny". Elmuh Fudd Syndwome: He talks like this as part of his act. The Fake Cutie: Bunny is adorable but he uses it to his advantage to get away with causing trouble.
